summary.lv: Klientu iesaistes speciālists LevelPath — AI procurement SaaS platformai (atlasi veic IT Camp) — pirmais kontaktpunkts lietotājiem, produkta lietošanas veicināšana un sadarbība ar produktu un izstrādes komandām, izmantojot Zendesk un Salesforce; nepieciešama 4+ gadu pieredze klientu apkalpošanā un B2B SaaS vidē.
summary.en: Customer engagement specialist for LevelPath, an AI-powered procurement SaaS platform (hiring via IT Camp), acting as the first point of contact for users, driving product adoption and partnering with product and engineering via Zendesk and Salesforce; 4+ years in a customer-facing role and B2B SaaS experience required.
